```{r tp_prep}
      ICC_nh_fu, ICC_lower_95_CI_nh_fu, ICC_upper_95_CI_nh_fu
    ),
    ICC_combat_CI = sprintf(
      "%.2f (%.2f, %.2f)",
      ICC_combat_fu, ICC_lower_95_CI_combat_fu, ICC_upper_95_CI_combat_fu
    )
  ) 
df_fu$ROI[nrow(df_fu)] <- "WMHV"

pd_mat <- outcomes$tp_life_pd_matrices

pd_bl <- data.frame(matrix(nrow = 6, ncol = 4))
colnames(pd_bl) <- c("ROI", "mean_pd_pre", "mean_pd_nh", "mean_pd_combat")
pd_bl$ROI <- c("TGMV", "TCV", "LVV",  "HCV", "AV", "WMHV")
for (outcome in c("TGMV", "TCV", "LVV",  "HCV", "AV", "WMHV")){
  pre <- pd_mat[[paste0(outcome, "_mean_pd_mat_bl")]]
  nh <- pd_mat[[paste0(outcome, "_mean_pd_mat_nh_bl")]]
  combat <- pd_mat[[paste0(outcome, "_mean_pd_mat_combat_bl")]]
  pd_bl[pd_bl$ROI == outcome, "mean_pd_pre"] <- mean(abs(pre), na.rm = T)
  pd_bl[pd_bl$ROI == outcome, "mean_pd_nh"] <- mean(abs(nh), na.rm = T)
  pd_bl[pd_bl$ROI == outcome, "mean_pd_combat"] <- mean(abs(combat), na.rm = T)
}
pd_bl[,c("mean_pd_pre", "mean_pd_nh", "mean_pd_combat")] <- round(pd_bl[,c("mean_pd_pre", "mean_pd_nh", "mean_pd_combat")], digits = 3)
pd_fu <- data.frame(matrix(nrow = 6, ncol = 4))
colnames(pd_fu) <- c("ROI", "mean_pd_pre", "mean_pd_nh", "mean_pd_combat")
pd_fu$ROI <- c("TGMV", "TCV", "LVV",  "HCV", "AV", "WMHV")
for (outcome in c("TGMV", "TCV", "LVV",  "HCV", "AV", "WMHV")){
  pre <- pd_mat[[paste0(outcome, "_mean_pd_mat_fu")]]
  nh <- pd_mat[[paste0(outcome, "_mean_pd_mat_nh_fu")]]
  combat <- pd_mat[[paste0(outcome, "_mean_pd_mat_combat_fu")]]
  pd_fu[pd_fu$ROI == outcome, "mean_pd_pre"] <- mean(abs(pre), na.rm = T)
  pd_fu[pd_fu$ROI == outcome, "mean_pd_nh"] <- mean(abs(nh), na.rm = T)
  pd_fu[pd_fu$ROI == outcome, "mean_pd_combat"] <- mean(abs(combat), na.rm = T)
}
pd_fu[,c("mean_pd_pre", "mean_pd_nh", "mean_pd_combat")] <- round(pd_fu[,c("mean_pd_pre", "mean_pd_nh", "mean_pd_combat")], digits = 3)
pwcs <- outcomes$tp_life_pwcs
pwcs$pwc_wmhv_bl$measure <- "WMHV"
pwcs$pwc_wmhv_combat_bl$measure <- "WMHV"
pwcs$pwc_wmhv_nh_bl$measure <- "WMHV"
# ignore "adjusted" cols (there was no adjustment)
pwc <- rbind(pwcs$pwc_bl[,!grepl("adj", colnames(pwcs$pwc_bl))], pwcs$pwc_wmhv_bl)
pwc_combat <- rbind(pwcs$pwc_combat_bl[,!grepl("adj", colnames(pwcs$pwc_combat_bl))], pwcs$pwc_wmhv_combat_bl)
colnames(pwc_combat) <- paste0(colnames(pwc_combat), "_combat")
pwc_nh <- rbind(pwcs$pwc_nh_bl[,!grepl("adj", colnames(pwcs$pwc_nh_bl))], pwcs$pwc_wmhv_nh_bl)
colnames(pwc_nh) <- paste0(colnames(pwc_nh), "_nh")
pwc_all_bl <- cbind(pwc, pwc_combat, pwc_nh)
pwc_all_bl$p <- ifelse(pwc_all_bl$p < 0.001, formatC(pwc_all_bl$p, format = "e", digits = 2), pwc_all_bl$p)
pwc_all_bl$p_nh <- ifelse(pwc_all_bl$p_nh < 0.001, formatC(pwc_all_bl$p_nh, format = "e", digits = 2), pwc_all_bl$p_nh)
pwc_all_bl$p_combat <- ifelse(pwc_all_bl$p_combat < 0.001, formatC(pwc_all_bl$p_combat, format = "e", digits = 2), pwc_all_bl$p_combat)
pwcs$pwc_wmhv_fu$measure <- "WMHV"
pwcs$pwc_wmhv_combat_fu$measure <- "WMHV"
pwcs$pwc_wmhv_nh_fu$measure <- "WMHV"
# ignore "adjusted" cols (there was no adjustment)
pwc <- rbind(pwcs$pwc_fu[,!grepl("adj", colnames(pwcs$pwc_fu))], pwcs$pwc_wmhv_fu)
pwc_combat <- rbind(pwcs$pwc_combat_fu[,!grepl("adj", colnames(pwcs$pwc_combat_fu))], pwcs$pwc_wmhv_combat_fu)
colnames(pwc_combat) <- paste0(colnames(pwc_combat), "_combat")
pwc_nh <- rbind(pwcs$pwc_nh_fu[,!grepl("adj", colnames(pwcs$pwc_nh_fu))], pwcs$pwc_wmhv_nh_fu)
colnames(pwc_nh) <- paste0(colnames(pwc_nh), "_nh")
pwc_all_fu <- cbind(pwc, pwc_combat, pwc_nh)
pwc_all_fu$p <- ifelse(pwc_all_fu$p < 0.001, formatC(pwc_all_fu$p, format = "e", digits = 2), pwc_all_fu$p)
pwc_all_fu$p_nh <- ifelse(pwc_all_fu$p_nh < 0.001, formatC(pwc_all_fu$p_nh, format = "e", digits = 2), pwc_all_fu$p_nh)
pwc_all_fu$p_combat <- ifelse(pwc_all_fu$p_combat < 0.001, formatC(pwc_all_fu$p_combat, format = "e", digits = 2), pwc_all_fu$p_combat)
```

```{r }
#| label: tbl-life-bl-icc
#| tbl-cap: "Baseline ICCs before and after harmonization in the LIFE-Adult data"
#| echo: false
#| warning: false
#| message: false
#| error: false
df_bl[, c("ROI", "ICC_CI", "ICC_nh_CI", "ICC_combat_CI")] %>%
  kable(
    col.names = c("ROI", "ICC (95% CI)", "ICC (95% CI) ~ neuroHarm", "ICC (95% CI) ~ ComBat"),
    format = "latex",
    booktabs = TRUE,
    align = "c"
  ) %>%
  kable_styling(latex_options = c("hold_position")) %>%
  footnote(
    general = "ROI = region of interest; ICC = intraclass correlation coefficient; CI = confidence interval; ~ neuroHarm = harmonized with neuroHarmonize; ~ ComBat = harmonized with longitudinal ComBat; TGMV = total grey matter volume; TCV = total cortical volume; LVV = lateral ventricle volume; HCV = bilateral hippocampal volume; AV = bilateral amygdala volume; WMHV = white matter hyperintensity volume",
    general_title = "",
    threeparttable = TRUE
  )
```

```{r }
#| label: tbl-life-fu-icc
#| tbl-cap: "Follow-up ICCs before and after harmonization in the LIFE-Adult data"
#| echo: false
#| warning: false
#| message: false
#| error: false
df_fu[, c("ROI", "ICC_CI", "ICC_nh_CI", "ICC_combat_CI")] %>%
  kable(
    col.names = c("ROI", "ICC (95% CI)", "ICC (95% CI) ~ neuroHarm", "ICC (95% CI) ~ ComBat"),
    format = "latex",
    booktabs = TRUE,
    align = "c"
  ) %>%
  kable_styling(latex_options = c("hold_position")) %>%
  footnote(
    general = "ROI = region of interest; ICC = intraclass correlation coefficient; CI = confidence interval; ~ neuroHarm = harmonized with neuroHarmonize; ~ ComBat = harmonized with longitudinal ComBat; TGMV = total grey matter volume; TCV = total cortical volume; LVV = lateral ventricle volume; HCV = bilateral hippocampal volume; AV = bilateral amygdala volume; WMHV = white matter hyperintensity volume",
    general_title = "",
    threeparttable = TRUE
  )
```

```{r }
#| label: tbl-life-bl-pd
#| tbl-cap: "Baseline percent differences before and after harmonization in the LIFE-Adult data"
#| echo: false
#| warning: false
#| message: false
#| error: false
pd_bl %>%
  kable(
    col.names = c("ROI", "PD", "PD ~ neuroHarm", "PD ~ ComBat"),
    format = "latex",
    booktabs = TRUE,
  ) %>%
  kable_styling(latex_options = c("hold_position")) %>%
  column_spec(which(colnames(pd_sub2) %in% c("pre", "nh", "combat")), extra_css = "text-align: right;") %>%
  footnote(
    general = "ROI = region of interest; PD = percent difference; ~ neuroHarm = harmonized with neuroHarmonize; ~ ComBat = harmonized with longitudinal ComBat; TIV = total intracranial volume; TGMV = total grey matter volume; TWMV = total white matter volume; TCV = total cortical volume; LVV = lateral ventricle volume; HCV = bilateral hippocampal volume; AV = bilateral amygdala volume",
    general_title = "",
    threeparttable = TRUE
    )
```

```{r }
#| label: tbl-life-fu-pd
#| tbl-cap: "Follow-up percent differences before and after harmonization in the LIFE-Adult data"
#| echo: false
#| warning: false
#| message: false
#| error: false
pd_fu %>%
  kable(
    col.names = c("ROI", "PD", "PD ~ neuroHarm", "PD ~ ComBat"),
    format = "latex",
    booktabs = TRUE,
  ) %>%
  kable_styling(latex_options = c("hold_position")) %>%
  column_spec(which(colnames(pd_sub2) %in% c("pre", "nh", "combat")), extra_css = "text-align: right;") %>%
  footnote(
    general = "ROI = region of interest; PD = percent difference; ~ neuroHarm = harmonized with neuroHarmonize; ~ ComBat = harmonized with longitudinal ComBat; TIV = total intracranial volume; TGMV = total grey matter volume; TWMV = total white matter volume; TCV = total cortical volume; LVV = lateral ventricle volume; HCV = bilateral hippocampal volume; AV = bilateral amygdala volume",
    general_title = "",
    threeparttable = TRUE
  )
```

```{r }
#| label: tbl-life-bl-signif
#| tbl-cap: "Statistical significance of differences before and after harmonization in the baseline LIFE-Adult data"
#| echo: false
#| warning: false
#| message: false
#| error: false
pwc_all_bl[, c("measure", "p", "p_nh", "p_combat")] %>%
  kable(
    col.names = c("ROI", "p", "p ~ neuroHarm", "p ~ ComBat"),
    format = "latex",
    booktabs = TRUE,
    align = "c"
  ) %>%
  kable_styling(latex_options = c("hold_position")) %>%
  footnote(
    general = "ROI = region of interest; p = p-value; ~ neuroHarm = harmonized with neuroHarmonize; ~ ComBat = harmonized with longitudinal ComBat; TGMV = total grey matter volume; TCV = total cortical volume; LVV = lateral ventricle volume; HCV = bilateral hippocampal volume; AV = bilateral amygdala volume; WMHV = white matter hyperintensity volume",
    general_title = "",
    threeparttable = TRUE
  )
```

```{r }
#| label: tbl-life-fu-signif
#| tbl-cap: "Statistical significance of differences before and after harmonization in the follow-up LIFE-Adult data"
#| echo: false
#| warning: false
#| message: false
#| error: false
pwc_all_fu[, c("measure", "p", "p_nh", "p_combat")] %>%
  kable(
    col.names = c("ROI", "p", "p ~ neuroHarm", "p ~ ComBat"),
    format = "latex",
    booktabs = TRUE,
    align = "c"
  ) %>%
  kable_styling(latex_options = c("hold_position")) %>%
  footnote(
    general = "ROI = region of interest; p = p-value; ~ neuroHarm = harmonized with neuroHarmonize; ~ ComBat = harmonized with longitudinal ComBat; TGMV = total grey matter volume; TCV = total cortical volume; LVV = lateral ventricle volume; HCV = bilateral hippocampal volume; AV = bilateral amygdala volume; WMHV = white matter hyperintensity volume",
    general_title = "",
    threeparttable = TRUE
  )
```

\FloatBarrier

## Supplementary figures

```{r fig.width=6, fig.height=12}
#| label: fig-ba-dtgmv
#| fig-cap: "Bland-Altman plots of TGMV changes. Blue vertical lines indicate the size of one standard deviationof TGMV. TGMV = Total Grey Matter Volume"
#| echo: false
#| warning: false
#| message: false
#| error: false
#| out-width: "100%"
#| out-height: "90%"
#| dpi: 900
load("/data/pt_life/ResearchProjects/LLammer/intergeneration/segmentation_harmonization/Results/ba_plots.RData")
print(ba_plots$wrapped_life_ba_plots[[paste0("dTGMV")]])
```

```{r fig.width=6, fig.height=12}
#| label: fig-ba-dtcv
#| fig-cap: "Bland-Altman plots of TCV changes. Blue vertical lines indicate the size of one standard deviation of TCV. TCV = Total Cortical Volume"
#| echo: false
#| warning: false
#| message: false
#| error: false
#| out-width: "100%"
#| out-height: "90%"
#| dpi: 900
print(ba_plots$wrapped_life_ba_plots[[paste0("dTCV")]])
```

```{r fig.width=6, fig.height=12}
#| label: fig-ba-dlvv
#| fig-cap: "Bland-Altman plots of LVV changes. Blue vertical lines indicate the size of one standard deviation of LVV. LVV = bilateral lateral ventricle volume"
#| echo: false
#| warning: false
#| message: false
#| error: false
#| out-width: "100%"
#| out-height: "90%"
#| dpi: 900
print(ba_plots$wrapped_life_ba_plots[[paste0("dLVV")]])
```

```{r fig.width=6, fig.height=12}
#| label: fig-ba-dhcv
#| fig-cap: "Bland-Altman plots of HCV changes. Blue vertical lines indicate tghe size of one standard deviation of HCV. HCV = bilateral hippocampal volume"
#| echo: false
#| warning: false
#| message: false
#| error: false
#| out-width: "100%"
#| out-height: "90%"
#| dpi: 900
print(ba_plots$wrapped_life_ba_plots[[paste0("dHCV")]])
```

```{r fig.width=6, fig.height=12}
#| label: fig-ba-dav
#| fig-cap: "Bland-Altman plots of AV changes. Blue vertical lines indicate the size of one standard deviation of AV. AV = bilateral amygdala volume"
#| echo: false
#| warning: false
#| message: false
#| error: false
#| out-width: "100%"
#| out-height: "90%"
#| dpi: 900
print(ba_plots$wrapped_life_ba_plots[[paste0("dAV")]])
```

```{r fig.width=6, fig.height=12}
#| label: fig-ba-bl-tgmv
#| fig-cap: "Bland-Altman plots of baseline TGMV. Blue vertical lines indicate the size of one standard deviation of baseline TGMV. TGMV = Total Grey Matter Volume"
#| echo: false
#| warning: false
#| message: false
#| error: false
#| out-width: "100%"
#| out-height: "90%"
#| dpi: 900
print(ba_plots$tp_wrapped_life_ba_plots[[paste0("TGMV", "_bl")]])
```

```{r fig.width=6, fig.height=12}
#| label: fig-ba-bl-tcv
#| fig-cap: "Bland-Altman plots of baseline TCV. Blue vertical lines indicate the size of one standard deviation of baseline TCV. TCV = Total Cortical Volume"
#| echo: false
#| warning: false
#| message: false
#| error: false
#| out-width: "100%"
#| out-height: "90%"
#| dpi: 900
print(ba_plots$tp_wrapped_life_ba_plots[[paste0("TCV", "_bl")]])
```

```{r fig.width=6, fig.height=12}
#| label: fig-ba-bl-lvv
#| fig-cap: "Bland-Altman plots of baseline LVV. Blue vertical lines indicate the size of one standard deviation of baseline LVV. LVV = bilateral lateral ventricle volume"
#| echo: false
#| warning: false
#| message: false
#| error: false
#| out-width: "100%"
#| out-height: "90%"
#| dpi: 900
print(ba_plots$tp_wrapped_life_ba_plots[[paste0("LVV", "_bl")]])
```

```{r fig.width=6, fig.height=12}
#| label: fig-ba-bl-hcv
#| fig-cap: "Bland-Altman plots of baseline HCV. Blue vertical lines indicate the size of one standard deviation of baseline HCV. HCV = bilateral hippocampal volume"
#| echo: false
#| warning: false
#| message: false
#| error: false
#| out-width: "100%"
#| out-height: "90%"
#| dpi: 900
print(ba_plots$tp_wrapped_life_ba_plots[[paste0("HCV", "_bl")]])
```

```{r fig.width=6, fig.height=12}
#| label: fig-ba-bl-av
#| fig-cap: "Bland-Altman plots of baseline AV. Blue vertical lines indicate tghe size of one standard deviation of baseline AV. AV = bilateral amygdala volume"
#| echo: false
#| warning: false
#| message: false
#| error: false
#| out-width: "100%"
#| out-height: "90%"
#| dpi: 900
print(ba_plots$tp_wrapped_life_ba_plots[[paste0("AV", "_bl")]])
```

```{r fig.width=6, fig.height=12}
#| label: fig-ba-fu-tgmv
#| fig-cap: "Bland-Altman plots of follow-up TGMV. Blue vertical lines indicate the size of one standard deviation of follow-up TGMV. TGMV = Total Grey Matter Volume"
#| echo: false
#| warning: false
#| message: false
#| error: false
#| out-width: "100%"
#| out-height: "90%"
#| dpi: 900
print(ba_plots$tp_wrapped_life_ba_plots[[paste0("TGMV", "_fu")]])
```

```{r fig.width=6, fig.height=12}
#| label: fig-ba-fu-tcv

#| echo: false
#| warning: false
#| message: false
#| error: false
#| out-width: "100%"
#| out-height: "90%"
#| dpi: 900
print(ba_plots$tp_wrapped_life_ba_plots[[paste0("TCV", "_fu")]])
```

```{r fig.width=6, fig.height=12}
#| label: fig-ba-fu-lvv

#| warning: false

#| error: false
#| out-width: "100%"
#| out-height: "90%"
#| dpi: 900
print(ba_plots$tp_wrapped_life_ba_plots[[paste0("LVV", "_fu")]])
```

```{r fig.width=6, fig.height=12}
#| label: fig-ba-fu-hcv
#| fig-cap: "Bland-Altman plots of follow-up HCV. Blue vertical lines indicate tghe size of follow-up HCV. HCV = bilateral hippocampal volume"
#| echo: false
#| warning: false
#| message: false
#| error: false
#| out-width: "100%"
#| out-height: "90%"
#| dpi: 900
print(ba_plots$tp_wrapped_life_ba_plots[[paste0("HCV", "_fu")]])
```

```{r fig.width=6, fig.height=12}
#| label: fig-ba-fu-av
#| fig-cap: "Bland-Altman plots of follow-up AV. Blue vertical lines indicate tghe size of one standard deviation of follow-up AV. AV = bilateral amygdala volume"
```
